title: Birds silent in the woods
author: Naturalist Observation
content: A sudden, eerie lack of bird song in an area where they are usually active.
action: A predator is likely nearby, causing the local wildlife to freeze.

title: Sunsets with a green flash
author: Atmospheric Optics
content: A brief glimpse of green light right as the sun dips below the horizon.
action: Extremely clear, dust-free atmospheric conditions are present.

title: High-altitude cloud movement
author: Meteorological Indicator
content: Wispy clouds moving in a direction different from surface winds.
action: A significant change in air pressure or weather patterns is shifting.

title: Bees avoiding flowers
author: Entomological Signal
content: Bees staying inside the hive or clustered around the entrance instead of foraging.
action: The bees sense an upcoming sharp drop in temperature or major storm.

title: Crickets chirping speed
author: Bioclimatic Metric
content: The frequency of cricket chirps increases as the ambient temperature rises.
action: You can estimate the air temperature by counting chirps per minute.
